name: Noble Plains Uranium Corp.
description: Noble Plains Uranium Corp. (TSXV: NOBL) is a Canada-based junior natural resource company focused on the acquisition and advancement of U.S.-based uranium projects. The company specializes in assets amenable to In Situ Recovery (ISR), which is considered a capital-efficient and environmentally responsible extraction method. By targeting historical and underexplored assets in supportive jurisdictions, Noble Plains aims to rapidly delineate NI 43-101-compliant resources. Strategically positioned to benefit from the growing domestic demand for uranium in the United States, the company employs a disciplined exploration approach to provide investors with leveraged exposure to the global nuclear energy cycle.
